# Maybee Creations

> Creatively Crafted educational discovery world maps and adventure guides for faith, freedom, sports fans, and the AI future.

Maybee Creations (https://maybeecreations.com) is a digital creation studio that makes printable fantasy-style cartography paired with adventure guidebooks. Products span four realms: Faith (Soul Explorer Bible maps), Freedom (Liberty Explorer civics maps), Fans (Legend Explorer Baseball Legend Lands), and Future (Tomorrow Explorer AI learning maps).

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://maybeecreations.com/): Overview of all four realms and downloadable educational maps
- [Faith](https://maybeecreations.com/faith): Soul Explorer Bible book category world maps and adventure guides
- [Freedom](https://maybeecreations.com/freedom): Liberty Explorer civics, founding figures, and American history maps
- [Fans](https://maybeecreations.com/fans): Legend Explorer Baseball Legend Lands for MLB teams and fan families
- [Future](https://maybeecreations.com/future): Tomorrow Explorer AI realm maps with Adventure Pack tutorials
- [Stories](https://maybeecreations.com/stories): Essays on the history and meaning behind the maps
- [Shop](https://payhip.com/MaybeeCreations): Payhip storefront for printable map downloads

## What we make

Educational discovery world maps are printable, fantasy-style maps paired with guidebooks full of prompts, missions, and reflections. They are designed for families, homeschoolers, students, teachers, and curious adults.

## Stories (blog)

- [Why We Map Stories](https://maybeecreations.com/stories/why-we-map-stories)
- [James Madison and the Map of Self-Government](https://maybeecreations.com/stories/james-madison-father-of-the-constitution)
- [Orange and Black, Land and Legend (San Francisco Giants)](https://maybeecreations.com/stories/san-francisco-giants-legend-land)
- [Two Hundred Fifty Years of the American Story](https://maybeecreations.com/stories/america-250-discovery-map)

## Audience

Families, homeschoolers, K-12 students, civics teachers, baseball fans, and beginners learning AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini).
